notes: Example instance showing an evolved registry (not the live bootstrap). Demonstrates (a) the bootstrap HMM/Markov entries from Wave 5B-2, (b) an appended z-score entry after a later pair's rerun, (c) an appended ROC entry, and (d) a percentile-rank entry — illustrating the append-only evolution pattern. Do NOT use this file in production; it exists only as a META-CF example for rule authors.

signals.description: Posterior probability of the stress regime from a 2-state Gaussian Hidden Markov Model fit on the indicator series. Values in [0, 1]; higher = more stressed.
signals.notes: Bootstrap entry. Regime label assigned by variance ranking.

signals.description: Maximum a-posteriori regime label from a 3-state Gaussian Hidden Markov Model (expansion / transition / contraction). Integer-valued in {0, 1, 2}.
signals.notes: Discrete state index, NOT a probability.

signals.description: Smoothed probability of the high-variance regime from a 2-state Markov-switching regression.
Rolling 252-trading-day z-score of the indicator level. Standardizes for cross-pair comparability.
signals.notes: Appended in Wave 6 when Building Permits pair required a standardized momentum signal.

signals.description: 63-trading-day (quarterly) rate-of-change of the indicator level, expressed as decimal return.
signals.notes: Quarterly momentum signal. Sign convention: positive = indicator rising.

signals.description: Rolling 1260-trading-day (5-year) empirical percentile rank of the indicator level. Values in [0, 1].
signals.notes: 5-year percentile rank is the canonical threshold input for P1_long_cash strategies on volatility indicators.
